# Soft28 Handoff30 Swarm200 Contract

## Soft 28
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.28 with quality bias floor 0.26 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 30
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.30 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Swarm 200
swarm expert bodies default to 200 chars, total 5k, inline 35, with hard floor total budget enforcement for denser multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
